code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut count = 0
mut token = ""
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 32
    if not string.is_empty(token)
      match string.parse_int(token)
      when Some(v)
        if v > 0
          count = count + 1
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      token = ""
    end
  else
    token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if not string.is_empty(token)
  match string.parse_int(token)
  when Some(v)
    if v > 0
      count = count + 1
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end
println("positive=#{count}")
